title: Second under-served script: community co-design, drawing, review, and release
context: The M2 pattern (fonts-script-201 through fonts-script-204) establishes the process for community co-designed script fonts. A second script is a backlog/future item, unscheduled until a second named community partner is secured. As with M2, this task must not start without a confirmed partner — verifiedNeed=false and the M2 entry gate applies. No script selection or drawing should occur before a partner co-signs the orthography and design brief.
objective: Replicate the full M2 community co-design process (partner outreach, co-signed brief, glyph drawing, native-reader review, release) for a second under-served script with a secured community partner.
acceptanceCriteria: A second named script authority or language-community partner is secured in writing; verifiedNeed remains false until this happens.
Orthography specification, glyph repertoire, and shaping requirements are co-signed by the second community partner before any drawing begins.
Glyph set drawn in UFO; OpenType GSUB/GPOS shaping implemented and verified clean via HarfBuzz against community test strings.
Native-reader correctness review passed (100%) before release.
Tagged release with static + variable + WOFF2 + specimen + OFL.txt + FONTLOG.txt crediting the community + provenance.json + language-coverage report.
At least one adoption event: community use confirmed or upstream (Noto/GF) PR initiated.
resources: TASKS.md (M2 tasks fonts-script-201 through fonts-script-204 as template)
output: A complete second community co-designed script font released as a tagged PR with static + variable + WOFF2, type specimen, native-reader sign-off, language-coverage report, and provenance documentation.
